brief_notes: Excellent full paper. All numbers verified: 5,275,457 records, 40,957 species, 5,407/day, 2,373,303 (45%), 1,420 audit, 132 species, 2,129+-4,157, 294+-471, 2,336+-3,718, 338+-571, 0.83+-0.20, 0.81+-0.20, beta=0.02, P=0.55, P<0.001. Strong contribution statement, named citations (phillips2006, johnston2018, sullivan2009ebird etc.). Multiple well-captioned figures and tables.
